problems.cause: Compute_Execution_Time is an AADL property declared in the implementation, not visible in the component type annex
problems.minimal_edit: Move the timing_constraint and dispatch_protocol assume/guarantee clauses from component type to implementation annex

problems.cause: Dispatch_Protocol is an AADL property in the implementation, not visible in component type scope
problems.minimal_edit: Move the dispatch_protocol assume/guarantee clauses from component type to implementation annex

problems.cause: AGREE does not natively parse AADL time units (ms, us); must use numeric literals in seconds or define constants
problems.minimal_edit: Replace '0 ms' with 0.0 and '100 us' with 0.0001 in all timing expressions

problems.cause: Aperiodic is an AADL enumeration literal, not an AGREE-visible symbol; cannot be used directly in AGREE equality
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the Dispatch_Protocol = Aperiodic clauses since no legal AGREE replacement exists without introducing new symbols

executor_steps: Delete the entire annex agree block from Telecommand_Processing (component type)
Create a new annex agree block in Telecommand_Processing.impl (implementation)
In the implementation annex, express timing constraint as: assume "timing_constraint": telecommand = telecommand => (0.0 <= Compute_Execution_Time and Compute_Execution_Time <= 0.0001);
In the implementation annex, express guarantee as: guarantee "compute_execution_time_bounds": telecommand = telecommand => (0.0 <= Compute_Execution_Time and Compute_Execution_Time <= 0.0001);

Omit Dispatch_Protocol = Aperiodic clauses entirely because Aperiodic is not a visible AGREE symbol and no valid replacement expression exists without violating requirement intent or introducing new identifiers
